Item Class: Waystones
Rarity: Rare
Ancient Intent
Waystone (Tier 15)
--------
Revives Available: 0 (augmented)
Item Rarity: +28% (augmented)
Pack Size: +18% (augmented)
Monster Effectiveness: +28% (augmented)
Waystone Drop Chance: +105% (augmented)
--------
Item Level: 81
--------
{ Prefix Modifier "Fleeting" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters have 10(10-15)% increased Attack, Cast and Movement Speed
{ Prefix Modifier "Destructive" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters have 239(200-240)% increased Critical Hit Chance
Monsters have +23(21-25)% Critical Damage Bonus
{ Prefix Modifier "Impacting" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters have 100(90-100)% increased Stun Buildup
{ Suffix Modifier "Flaming" (Tier: 1) }
Area has patches of Ignited Ground
{ Suffix Modifier "of Buffering" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters gain 20(12-25)% of maximum Life as Extra maximum Energy Shield
{ Suffix Modifier "of Smothering" (Tier: 1) }
Players have 36(40-36)% less Recovery Rate of Life and Energy Shield
--------
Can be used in a Map Device, allowing you to enter a Map. Waystones can only be used once.
